Proof of calls for Solana trading communities

Calls should not vanish into chat. SlimeWire proof workflows help connect calls, chart links, receipts, PnL context, proof cards, and outcomes for traders and groups.

Results pagesCall tracker

Key points

Call context

Tie a token call to CA, chart, and market context.

Receipts

Keep a record of actions, outcomes, or proof moments.

PnL context

Review results with wallet and position context where available.

Telegram proof

Give group calls a linkable trail outside chat noise.

Launch proof

Use proof pages around launch rooms and raid campaigns.

Honest framing

Proof helps review outcomes but does not guarantee future calls.

FAQ

What is proof of calls?

Proof of calls is a workflow for preserving token calls, context, receipts, and outcomes so they can be reviewed later.

Can proof pages help Telegram groups?

Yes. They make calls and outcomes easier to inspect after the chat has moved on.

Does a previous proof guarantee future wins?

No. Previous outcomes do not guarantee future trading performance.
